wolframNewlinesBetweenDefinitions.markdownDescription: Blank lines inserted between adjacent definitions.

wolframMaxBlankLinesBetweenCode.markdownDescription: Maximum source blank lines preserved between non-definition code statements.

wolframSpaceAfterComma.markdownDescription: Insert space after commas in argument lists.

wolframAlignRuleValues.markdownDescription: Align `Rule` and `RuleDelayed` values vertically in multiline argument, list, and association layouts.

wolframDocumentationCommentColumn.markdownDescription: Column for trailing documentation comments. `0` = auto-compute per contiguous block.

wolframDocumentationCommentPadding.markdownDescription: Minimum spaces between code and an aligned trailing documentation comment in auto mode.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Apply definition spacing only to adjacent declarations; preserve ordinary code spacing up to `wolframMaxBlankLinesBetweenCode`.
Apply top-level spacing to all statements.

wolframPreserveTildeInfixFunctions.markdownDescription: Comma-separated function names that stay in `~f~` infix form instead of normalizing to `f[x, y]`.

wolframCSTRequestTimeoutMs.markdownDescription: Milliseconds to wait for a WolframKernel CST parse request before restarting the kernel session.

wolframModuleVarsBreakThreshold.markdownDescription: Character count at which `Module`/`With`/`Block` var list breaks.

wolframConditionFirstFunctions.markdownDescription: Comma-separated symbols whose first arg stays on same line as head.

wolframCaseStructureFunctions.markdownDescription: Comma-separated symbols using alternating condition/body indentation.

wolframEnginePath.markdownDescription: Path to a Wolfram install or executable. Auto-detected if empty.

wolframLintRules.markdownDescription: JSON object string of per-rule level overrides, for example `{"prefer-rule-delayed":"error"}`.
